subcodes.first_line: O thou who art endowed with insight and vision, possessor of keen perception! Praise be unto God that thou hast rent asunder the veil and opened thy penetrating eye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بصیر ای بصار ای ذو بصر حدید حمد خدا را که کشف غطا نمودی و بصر حدید گشودی و
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
